title: Container equipped with tamper evident closure
abstract: A container (10) is described comprising: a base (11) comprising a mouth (15), a first edge (23) obtained around the mouth (15) and a second edge (24) connected to the first edge (23) by a lower wall (25); a cover (12) capable of being closed again on the base (11), the cover (12) comprising a base wall (31) and an edge (32) connected to the base wall (31) and adapted to be assembled with interference on the first edge (23) of the base (11); the cover (12) further comprising a tongue (16) connected to the edge (32) adapted to facilitate the grasp by a user, and a bending and/or breaking line (26) obtained on the tongue (16) along which the bending and/or the breaking of the tongue (16) is adapted to occur, to allow opening the container (10) providing evidence of the occurred opening.
claims:
Claims Container (10) comprising: a base (11) comprising a mouth (15) , a first edge (23) obtained around the mouth (15) and a second edge (24) connected to the first edge (23) by a lower wall (25); a cover (12) capable of being closed again on the base (11) , said cover (12) comprising a base wall (31) and an edge (32) connected to the base wall (31) and adapted to be assembled with interference on the first edge (23) of the base (11); said cover (12) further comprising a tongue (16) connected to the edge (32) adapted to facilitate the grasp by a user, and a bending and/or breaking line (26) obtained on the tongue (16) along which the bending and/or the breaking of the tongue (16) is adapted to occur, to allow opening the container (10) providing evidence of the occurred opening, characterized in that the second edge (24) passes around the tongue (16) when the cover (12) is closed on the base (11) , and in that when the cover (12) is closed on the base (11) with the edge (32) of the cover (12) 

 assembled with interference on the first edge (23) of the base (11) , the tongue (16) is overlapped to the lower wall (25) which connects the first edge (23) to the second edge (24) of the base (11) and arrives next to the second edge (24) to make it difficult to access to the tongue (16) . Container (10) according to claim 1, characterized in that the first edge (23) and the second edge (24) form two small channels around the mouth (15) of the base (11) , and in that the edge (32) forms a small channel around the cover (12), said small channel formed by the first edge (23) being adapted to be assembled with interference inside the small channel formed by the edge (32) of the cover (12) . Container (10) according to any one of the previous claims, characterized in that the first edge (23) comprises a first internal wall (27) connected to a side wall (22) of the base (11) , a first external wall (28) connected to the lower wall (25) and a first upper wall (29) connected to the first internal wall (27) and to the first external 

 wall (28) , in that the second edge (24) comprises a second internal wall (47) connected to the lower wall (25) , a second external wall (48) and a second upper wall (49) connected to the second internal wall (47) and to the second external wall (48), and in that the edge (32) of the cover (12) comprises an internal wall (37) connected to the base wall (31) of the cover (12) , an external wall (38) and an upper wall (39) connected to the internal wall (37) and to the external wall (38) . Container (10) according to claim 3, characterized in that the first upper wall (29) of the first edge (23) has sizes greater than those of an opening (33) of the edge (32) to assemble with interference the first edge (23) of the base (11) inside the edge (32) of the cover (12) when the cover (12) is closed on the base (11) . Container (10) according to any one of the previous claims, characterized in that when the cover (12) is closed on the base (11) with the edge (32) of the cover (12) assembled with interference on the first edge (23) of the 

base (11) , the tongue (16) is overlapped to the lower wall (25) which connects the first edge (23) to the second edge (24) of the base (11) and arrives next to the second edge (24) in order to leave room enough for inserting a finger between the edge of the tongue (16) and the second edge (24) . Container (10) according to any one of the previous claims, characterized in that the edge (32) of the cover (12) comprises a lower wall (35) adapted to be assembled in contact with the lower wall (25) which connects the first edge (23) to the second edge (24) when the cover (12) is closed on the base (11) .
